evidence.claim: Developed semantic search feature for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based chatbot using OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, and GPT-4
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system. Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Built production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature stores
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Learns through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Holds Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification
evidence.source_text: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2024)

evidence.claim: Comfortable with operational ML tasks including A/B testing and drift monitoring
evidence.source_text: Along the way I've gotten comfortable with the operational side — A/B testing, drift monitoring, retraining schedules.
